div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 360px; margin-left: 1660px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000; background-color: #ffffff;

display: inline-block; font-size: 15px; font-family: 'Times New Roman'; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); white-space: nowrap;
